description: The 'Ndrina Gioffrè is a powerful 'Ndrangheta clan based in Seminara, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, cigarette smuggling, prostitution, illegal waste disposal, infiltration of local government, and money laundering. The clan emerged victorious in the Faida di Seminara in the 1970s and later experienced internal conflicts in the 2000s. It remains active.
